chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Transfer Application No.D-01 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.168/2019 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A No.169/2019 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on M.A No.190/2019 21.01.2019. Mr. Nisar Ahmed Durrani, advocate for applicant *** 1. Granted. 2to5. Learned counsel for applicant submits that he does not press this Cr. Transfer Application because as per Section 28 of Anti-Terrorism Act, the same is to be filed before the Hon’ble Chief Justice at Karachi. Accordingly, instant Cr. Transfer Application is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
